pqs.question_text: Does your company use a district cooling service for air conditioning?
Do you use LPG (cooking gas or similar fuel) in your operations?
Do you segregate and recycle any of your waste (paper, plastic, etc.)?
Do you have petrol-fueled vehicles (company cars/fleet)?
Do your company vehicles use diesel fuel (e.g., trucks or generators on wheels)?
Does your company use diesel backup generators for power?
Do you have air conditioning or refrigeration units that require refrigerant (gas) top-ups or servicing?
Does your organization have significant value chain emissions that should be reported?
Does your organization purchase carbon offsets to compensate for emissions?
Does your company generate any hazardous waste (e.g. chemicals, batteries, medical waste)?
Do you generate any electricity on-site from renewable sources (solar panels, etc.)?
Does your company make ficial or in-kind donations to the community or charitable causes?
Do you have a formal process for selecting or evaluating your main suppliers?
Do you have diesel-fueled vehicles or generators?
Have you set a target to reduce your carbon footprint?
Do you have separate water meters for high consumption areas?
Do you use or purchase renewable energy?
Do you have automatic systems to turn off electricity when rooms are not in use?
Do you track your recycling rate?
Do you compost your organic waste?
Do you collaborate with local stakeholders on environmental initiatives?
Do you purchase eco-labeled equipment?

des.name: Electricity Consumption
des.description: Enter the total electricity consumed (in kWh) each month from your utility provider.

des.name: Water Consumption
des.description: Enter the total water consumed (in cubic meters) each month.

des.name: District Cooling Consumption
des.description: Enter the total district cooling energy consumed (in RT-h) each month from your utility provider.
des.condition_logic: Does your company use a district cooling service for air conditioning?

des.name: LPG Fuel Consumption
des.description: Enter the total LPG (propane) consumed (in kg) in the period.
des.condition_logic: Do you use LPG (cooking gas or similar fuel) in your operations?

des.name: Non-hazardous Waste Generated
des.description: Enter the total quantity of general (non-hazardous) waste generated (kg) for the period.

des.name: Waste Recycled
des.description: Enter the quantity of waste recycled (kg) in the period (if any).
des.condition_logic: Do you segregate and recycle any of your waste (paper, plastic, etc.)?

des.name: Vehicle Fuel Consumption â€“ Petrol
des.description: Enter the total petrol (gasoline) fuel consumed by company vehicles (liters per month).
des.condition_logic: Do you have petrol-fueled vehicles (company cars/fleet)?

des.name: Vehicle Fuel Consumption â€“ Diesel
des.description: Enter the total diesel fuel consumed by company vehicles (liters per month).
des.condition_logic: Do your company vehicles use diesel fuel (e.g., trucks or generators on wheels)?

des.name: Diesel Generator Fuel Consumption
des.description: Enter the total diesel fuel consumed by generators (liters per month).
des.condition_logic: Does your company use diesel backup generators for power?

des.name: Refrigerant Leakage
des.description: Enter the total amount of refrigerant (kg) added or leaked in the reporting period (by type, if possible).
des.condition_logic: Do you have air conditioning or refrigeration units that require refrigerant (gas) top-ups or servicing?

des.name: Total GHG Emissions
des.description: Enter the total carbon footprint (tCO2e) calculated for your establishment.

des.name: Guest Sustainability Education
des.description: Confirm the availability of environmental information to guests.

des.name: Sustainability Policy or Management System
des.description: Do you have a formal sustainability management system in place? (Yes/No)

des.name: Food Waste Reduction Initiatives
des.description: Do you have sustainable food waste management practices? (Yes/No)

des.name: Scope 1 Emissions
des.description: Enter your organization's direct (Scope 1) greenhouse gas emissions

des.name: Scope 2 Emissions
des.description: Enter your organization's indirect (Scope 2) greenhouse gas emissions from purchased energy

des.name: Scope 3 Emissions
des.description: Enter your organization's value chain (Scope 3) greenhouse gas emissions, if applicable
des.condition_logic: Does your organization have significant value chain emissions that should be reported?

des.name: Baseline Year Emissions
des.description: Unique

des.name: Emissions Reduction Target
des.description: Unique

des.name: Emissions Reduction Measures
des.description: Unique

des.name: Carbon Offsets Purchased
des.description: Enter the quantity of carbon offsets purchased during the reporting period
des.condition_logic: Does your organization purchase carbon offsets to compensate for emissions?

des.name: Hazardous Waste Generated
des.description: Enter the total quantity of hazardous waste generated (kg) for the reporting period.
des.condition_logic: Does your company generate any hazardous waste (e.g. chemicals, batteries, medical waste)?

des.name: On-site Renewable Energy Generation
des.description: Enter the electricity generated by your renewable energy system (kWh per month).
des.condition_logic: Do you generate any electricity on-site from renewable sources (solar panels, etc.)?

des.name: Total Workforce Size
des.description: Unique

des.name: Female Employee Percentage
des.description: Unique

des.name: New Hires
des.description: Unique

des.name: Employee Turnover Rate
des.description: Unique

des.name: Training Hours per Employee
des.description: Unique

des.name: Lost Time Injury Frequency Rate (LTIFR)
des.description: Unique

des.name: Total Recordable Injuries
des.description: Unique

des.name: Grievances Reported
des.description: Unique

des.name: Grievances Resolved
des.description: Unique

des.name: Workforce Nationalities
des.description: Unique

des.name: Community Investment
des.description: Enter the total value (in AED) of your community investment, including cash, in-kind donations, and volunteering hours, for the year.
des.condition_logic: Does your company make ficial or in-kind donations to the community or charitable causes?

des.name: Emissions Inventory Verification Status
des.description: Unique

des.name: Climate Risk Assessment
des.description: Unique

des.name: Board Oversight of Climate Issues
des.description: Unique

des.name: Ethics and Anti-Corruption Policy
des.description: Unique

des.name: Health & Safety Policy
des.description: Unique

des.name: Data Privacy and Governance Policy
des.description: Unique

des.name: Supplier Code of Conduct
des.description: Does your company have a formal Supplier Code of Conduct that is communicated to your suppliers? (Yes/No)
des.condition_logic: Do you have a formal process for selecting or evaluating your main suppliers?

des.name: Diesel - Owned Vehicles and Generators
des.description: Enter the total diesel fuel consumed (liters per month).
des.condition_logic: Do you have diesel-fueled vehicles or generators?

des.name: Performance Metrics (Carbon Calculator)
des.description: Do you submit monthly carbon emission data through the Dubai Carbon Calculator? (Yes/No)

des.name: Sustainability Personnel Training
des.description: Do you provide formal sustainability training to your personnel? (Yes/No)

des.name: Sustainability Committee
des.description: Do you have a formal sustainability committee or team? (Yes/No)

des.name: Staff Engagement and Education
des.description: Do you have formal staff engagement and education programs for sustainability? (Yes/No)

des.name: Green Events
des.description: Do you implement sustainable practices for events and conferences? (Yes/No)

des.name: Energy Management Plan
des.description: Do you have a formal energy management plan in place? (Yes/No)

des.name: Energy Management - Automation
des.description: Do you have automated systems for energy management? (Yes/No)

des.name: Transportation
des.description: Do you provide sustainable transportation options for guests and staff? (Yes/No)

des.name: Water Conservation
des.description: Do you have a formal water conservation measures in place? (Yes/No)

des.name: Wastewater
des.description: Do you have formal wastewater management practices in place? (Yes/No)

des.name: Waste Management Plan
des.description: Do you have a formal waste management plan in place? (Yes/No)

des.name: Waste Management â€“ Bathroom
des.description: Do you have sustainable waste management practices in bathrooms? (Yes/No)

des.name: Minimise Pollution
des.description: Do you have practices to minimize pollution? (Yes/No)

des.name: Harmful Substances
des.description: Do you have practices to manage and reduce harmful substances? (Yes/No)

des.name: Sustainable Purchasing
des.description: Do you have sustainable purchasing practices? (Yes/No)

des.name: Local Communities
des.description: Do you have formal local community engagement initiatives? (Yes/No)

des.name: Environmental Manager Appointment
des.description: Confirm the appointment of an environmental manager responsible for sustainability initiatives.

des.name: Annual Action Plan
des.description: Enter the number of action points in your annual sustainability action plan.

des.name: Carbon Reduction Target
des.description: Enter the percentage reduction target for your carbon footprint.
des.condition_logic: Have you set a target to reduce your carbon footprint?

des.name: Water Flow Rate - Showers
des.description: Enter the flow rate (L/min) of your showerheads.

des.name: Water Flow Rate - Taps
des.description: Enter the flow rate (L/min) of your taps.

des.name: Dual Flush Toilets
des.description: Confirm that newly purchased toilets have a 3/6 litres dual flush system.

des.name: Water Leak Detection System
des.description: Enter the number of leak checks performed daily.

des.name: Sub-metered Water Consumption
des.description: Enter the monthly water consumption (mÂ³) from sub-metered areas.
des.condition_logic: Do you have separate water meters for high consumption areas?

des.name: Energy-efficient Lighting
des.description: Enter the percentage of energy-efficient light bulbs in your establishment.

des.name: LED Lighting Percentage
des.description: Enter the percentage of LED light bulbs in your establishment.

des.name: Renewable Energy Percentage
des.description: Enter the percentage of renewable energy in your total energy consumption.
des.condition_logic: Do you use or purchase renewable energy?

des.name: Automatic Energy Control Systems
des.description: Confirm the presence of automatic energy control systems in guest and meeting rooms.
des.condition_logic: Do you have automatic systems to turn off electricity when rooms are not in use?

des.name: Waste Separation Categories
des.description: Enter the number of waste categories you separate for recycling.

des.name: Recycling Rate
des.description: Enter the percentage of waste that is recycled.
des.condition_logic: Do you track your recycling rate?

des.name: Organic Waste Composting
des.description: Enter the quantity of organic waste composted (kg) in the period.
des.condition_logic: Do you compost your organic waste?

des.name: Sustainable Food Products
des.description: Enter the number of types of sustainable food/beverage products you purchase.

des.name: Vegetarian/Vegan Options
des.description: Confirm the availability of vegetarian and vegan menu options.

des.name: Staff Training Hours
des.description: Enter the total hours of environmental and sustainability training provided to staff annually.

des.name: Community Engagement
des.description: Enter the number of community engagement activities you participate in annually.
des.condition_logic: Do you collaborate with local stakeholders on environmental initiatives?

des.name: Eco-labeled Cleaning Products
des.description: Enter the percentage of eco-labeled cleaning products you use.

des.name: Non-chlorine Paper Products
des.description: Confirm the use of non-chlorine bleached or eco-labeled paper products.

des.name: Eco-labeled Equipment
des.description: Confirm that newly purchased equipment is eco-labeled.
des.condition_logic: Do you purchase eco-labeled equipment?
